name: Hoden Seimitsu Kako Kenkyusho Co., Ltd.
summary: Hoden Seimitsu Kako Kenkyusho Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electric discharge machining, industrial gas turbine parts, and other metal products. It offers industrial gas turbine parts, aircraft engine parts, servo press machines, surface treatment solutions, dies and moldings, and automotive parts. The company was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
